◆ ECS_ASSERT

#define ECS_ASSERT ( expr,
fmt,
... )
Value:
do { \
if (!(expr)) { \
auto msg = std::format(fmt __VA_OPT__(, ) __VA_ARGS__); \
std::fprintf(stderr, \
"\n\033[1;31m[ECS ASSERT]\033[0m\n" \
" Expr: %s\n" \
" File: %s:%d\n" \
" Func: %s\n" \
" Msg : %s\n\n", \
#expr, __FILE__, __LINE__, __func__, msg.c_str()); \
ECS_TRAP(); \
} \
} while (0)
